description: Grant time-bounded consent for a dApp origin to sign with a Tier 1 wallet. Scope can target a single wallet (chain + walletAddress) or all Tier 1 wallets (omit both).

walletAddress.description: Required if chain is provided; scope narrows to this single wallet.

ttlSeconds.description: Grant lifetime. Default 604800 (7 days), max 2592000 (30 days), min 60.

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Missing dappOrigin, malformed origin URL, or invalid ttl/scope.

errors.name: UnsupportedChain
errors.description: chain must be ethereum or solana if provided.
